From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

**Martin Meehan** may refer to:

* [Marty Meehan](/wiki/Marty_Meehan "Marty Meehan") (born 1956), former U.S. Representative from Massachusetts and current Chancellor of the University of Massachusetts, Lowell
* [Martin Meehan (Irish republican)](/wiki/Martin_Meehan_(Irish_republican) "Martin Meehan (Irish republican)") (1945–2007), Provisional Irish Republican Army member and Sinn Féin politician for South Antrim
